  "i18n_en": {
    "多篇7月10-13日最新报道显示加息概率（CME 46.5%、伊朗冲突推高至70%）明显上升，与市场64% YES存在张力，但CNBC'family fight'及多数分析仍指向'即便加息也是一次性后转为持稳'，与YES路径部分吻合。价格流动性深、参与广、可作强锚，但市场自身近期振荡（0.64-0.84）显示犹豫度不低，且距结算15天、加息与否的硬事实尚未落地，故信心压至中等。 这一注押 Yes，顺 edge。": "Multiple reports from July 10-13 show rate hike probability (CME 46.5%, pushed to 70% by Iran conflict) rising notably, creating tension with the market's 64% YES, but CNBC's 'family fight' piece and most analyses still point to 'even if a hike occurs, it would be one-time before holding steady,' partially aligning with the YES path. Deep price liquidity, broad participation, can serve as a strong anchor, but the market's own recent volatility (0.64-0.84) shows notable hesitation, and with 15 days to settlement, the hard fact of whether a hike occurs has not yet materialized, so confidence is capped at medium. This bet is on Yes, following the edge.",
    "7月会议是否会真正落地一次加息（而非仅市场定价概率上升），这决定'会议后利率不变'能否成立": "Whether the July meeting will actually deliver a rate hike (rather than just a rise in market-implied probability), which determines whether 'unchanged rate after the meeting' can hold",
    "文章池显示的是治理压力上升的信号，但没有任何报道涉及具体的下台机制——继任安排、逼宫、政变或健康问题缺位，普京仍能以强势姿态公开露面。价格虽因鲸鱼集中、流动性表面深但参与集中而被打折，但方向与证据基本一致，且170天窗口内缺乏硬性推翻机制使得基准概率本就该低。社媒情绪平淡（acceleration=0），不构成额外信号。 这一注押 No，顺 edge。": "The article pool shows signals of rising governance pressure, but no reports involve any concrete mechanism for stepping down—succession arrangements, internal coup pressure, a putsch, or health issues are all absent, and Putin continues to appear publicly in a position of strength. Although the price is discounted due to whale concentration and apparent-but-concentrated liquidity, the direction is largely consistent with the evidence, and the lack of a hard override mechanism within the 170-day window means the base rate should already be low. Social media sentiment is flat (acceleration=0), providing no additional signal. This position is on No, following the edge.",
    "国内压力（银行危机、燃料短缺、战场叙事落差）是否会转化为实质性的权力交接机制（政变、宪政程序、继任安排），而非仅停留在舆论猜测层面": "Whether domestic pressure (banking crisis, fuel shortages, battlefield narrative gap) will translate into a substantive power transfer mechanism (coup, constitutional process, succession arrangement), rather than remaining merely at the level of public speculation"
  }
}
